zh.lifeSummary: 當George Coles於大約1546年出生在英國素可普爾波洛時，他的父親Robert Cole16歲，母親Mary Ann Evelyn19歲。他於1574年與Alice Sargent在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年6月23日在英國英格蘭素可普爾波洛享年67歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Coles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of Cole , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Collis
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Collins  .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When George Coles was born about 1546, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, his father, Robert Cole, was 16 and his mother, Mary Ann Evelyn, was 19. He married Alice Sargent in 1574, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 June 1612, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in England.

Il a épousé Alice Sargent en 1574, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1612, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

ko.Kingston Upon Thames, Surrey, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스
ko.lifeSummary: George Coles(이)가 대략 1546년 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cole(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ann Evelyn(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Alice Sargent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 6월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 풀버루그h에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.Kingston Upon Thames, Surrey, England: кингстон упон тамесь, сурри, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Coles родился около 1546 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cole было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Evelyn, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Sargent в 1574 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 июня 1612 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
